title: Euan's Optimized Pack
description: A optimization pack focused purely on improving FPS and performance, no gameplay or visual changes, just smooth, efficient Minecraft.
body:
![Euan's Optimized Pack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9f464e215a76583cebc898f99162b6cd2997035.png)_Pure performance. Zero fluff._

My very own collection of optimization-focused mods designed to make Minecraft faster, smoother, and more efficient, without changing gameplay mechanics or visuals. Whether you're on a low-end PC or just want the best FPS possible, this pack strips away the lag and boosts performance where it counts.

- ✅ Boosts FPS and chunk loading
- ✅ Reduces memory usage and stutter
- ✅ No gameplay or visual changes
- ✅ Just pure, clean optimization

**Check out my other modpacks:**
* [Euan's QOL Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-qol-pack)
* [Euan's Tools Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-tools-pack)
* [Euan's Visuals Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/euans-visuals-pack)
---
If you have any questions or run into issues, you can join my Discord server through the project’s links!
